summary: Iteration 15 - Testing 10 Ultra Differentiation Features. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 6 new pages accessible via sidebar, Signal Timeline page fully verified with data, other pages load but may show spinner due to preview environment latency.

issues: Page loads but may show loading spinner longer due to API latency in preview environment - backend API confirmed working via direct curl

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ultra/cross-analysis returns opportunities, warnings, insights, market_regime, fear_greed, cross_score
Backend: GET /api/ultra/market-personality/BTC returns Bitcoin profile (personality: The Disruptor, risk: extreme, volatility: 92)
Backend: GET /api/ultra/market-personality/UNKNOWN returns generic profile for unknown assets
Backend: GET /api/ultra/market-personalities returns 10 tracked assets (BTC, ETH, NVDA, AAPL, GOLD, TSLA, SOL, SPY, OIL, EUR/USD)
Backend: GET /api/ultra/signal-timeline returns 30 signals with stats (win_rate, avg_return, active count)
Backend: GET /api/ultra/capital-flow returns 10 sectors with flow %, volume, status, leaders, colors
Backend: GET /api/ultra/intelligence-mode returns regime (RISK-ON/OFF/NEUTRAL), fear_greed, decisions (>=70% confidence only)
Backend: GET /api/ultra/user-profile returns trading profile (profile_type, risk_appetite, stats, recommendations)
Backend: GET /api/ultra/decision-replay-list returns 3 closed trades (BTC, ETH, AAPL)
Backend: GET /api/ultra/decision-replay/{trade_id} returns AI trade analysis with entry/exit timing scores, risk grade
Backend: GET /api/ultra/decision-replay/invalid returns 404 for non-existent trades
Backend: GET /api/ultra/locked-signals returns signals with is_locked=true for high-confidence (>=80%) on free plan
Backend: POST /api/ultra/why-this-trade returns AI trade explanation (liquidity_score, structure_score, pattern, probability)
Backend: GET /api/ultra/jarvis-briefing returns AI institutional briefing (GPT-5.2, ~15-30s response time)
Frontend: Sidebar shows all 6 new navigation items (JARVIS Hub, Signal Timeline, Capital Flow, Market DNA, Intel Mode, Decision Replay)
Frontend: Signal Timeline page fully loaded with 30 signals, stats bar (Total: 30, Winners: 16, Win Rate: 59.3%), filter tabs
Frontend: Decision Replay page shows 'Closed Trades' section and 'Select a trade to replay' prompt
Frontend: All pages navigate correctly via sidebar clicks
critical_code_review_comments: Market Personality data is static (hardcoded in MARKET_PERSONALITIES dict) — provides realistic asset profiles for 10 assets
Signal Timeline generates randomized historical signals with realistic outcomes — win rate and returns calculated dynamically
Capital Flow sector data uses random values for flow % — production would integrate with real institutional flow data
Intelligence Mode filters signals to >=70% confidence only — clean minimal UI data for serious traders
JARVIS Briefing and Why This Trade use real GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key (10-30 second response time)
Decision Replay uses GPT-5.2 for post-trade analysis — requires auth and closed trade history
Signal Confidence Lock correctly hides entry/stop_loss/target for >=80% confidence signals on free plan
User Profile correctly analyzes trade history and provides personalized recommendations based on behavior patterns
seed_data_creation: Test user already has 3 closed trades (BTC +$2500, ETH -$500, AAPL +$200) for Decision Replay testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 tested 10 Ultra Differentiation Features. All 10 endpoints under /api/ultra/* working: cross-analysis (aggregates data from other endpoints), jarvis-briefing (GPT-5.2 institutional morning brief), why-this-trade (GPT-5.2 trade explanation), decision-replay (GPT-5.2 post-trade analysis), market-personality (static asset DNA profiles), signal-timeline (30 historical signals with outcomes), locked-signals (monetization - locks high-confidence for free users), capital-flow (10 sector heatmap), intelligence-mode (minimal UI data), user-profile (self-improving trading profile). Frontend has 6 new pages: /cross-analysis (JARVIS Hub), /decision-replay, /market-personality, /signal-timeline, /capital-flow, /intelligence-mode. Sidebar navigation updated with 19 items total. AI endpoints (jarvis-briefing, why-this-trade, decision-replay) take 10-30 seconds due to GPT-5.2 calls. Test user (test@test.com/test) has 3 closed paper trades for replay testing.

Capital Flow sector flows (random percentages, production would use real data)

Why This Trade: GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key
Decision Replay: GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key
